Before You Generate

M1 Concourse · American Speed Festival · AI Fan Selfie

1. Consent to Use Your Likeness

By proceeding, you consent to uploading your photo to generate an AI-composited image ("Fan Selfie") for personal, non-commercial social media sharing purposes related to the American Speed Festival at M1 Concourse.

2. AI-Generated Content

The Fan Selfie is created using artificial intelligence and does not represent a real photograph. The image is synthetic and generated solely for entertainment purposes.

3. Photo Storage & Privacy

Your uploaded photo is processed in real time to generate the Fan Selfie. Photos are not stored on M1 Concourse servers beyond the duration of the generation process. Images are transmitted to a third-party AI service (fal.ai) solely for generation purposes.

4. Driver / Influencer Likeness

The drivers and influencers featured in this tool have consented to their likeness being used for this fan experience at the American Speed Festival. Use of generated images is limited to personal social media sharing only.

5. Prohibited Uses

You agree not to use the generated image for commercial purposes, to misrepresent the image as a real photograph, to harass or defame any individual, or for any unlawful purpose.

6. Ownership

M1 Concourse retains rights to the generated image format and branding. You retain rights to your own likeness. Generated images may be used by M1 Concourse for promotional purposes with your consent indicated by proceeding.

7. Age Requirement

You confirm that you are 13 years of age or older. If you are under 18, you confirm you have parental or guardian consent to participate.

8. Limitation of Liability

M1 Concourse and the American Speed Festival are not liable for any damages arising from the use or sharing of AI-generated images produced by this tool.
